links.source_location: VertexCL packs cl_float4 from Vector3D fields
new version adds SameSite field + setSameSite/getSameSite + 9th constructor param; otherwise identical RFC2109 cookie parsing/serialization

httplistener.h includes httpconnectionhandler.h/httpconnectionhandlerpool.h and dispatches socketDescriptor to handleConnection via QMetaObject::invokeMethod (httplistener.cpp:78); the only httpconnectionhandler.h/.cpp in the repo lives under httpserver_new/
read:164 new HttpRequest(settings); :173 readFromSocket; :169-171 getStatus; :219 getHeader; :229 getVersion
read:218 new HttpResponse(socket); :222/233 setHeader; :249 hasSentLastPart; :251 write; :260 getHeaders
getSession:67-82 getId/setLastAccess; sessionTimerEvent:110 getLastAccess; removeSession:125 getId

getSession constructs HttpCookie with 6 positional args (cookieName,id,expirationTime/1000,path,comment,domain) matching the httpserver/httpcookie.h signature; would benefit from SameSite added in the new version
constructor:19 loadSslConfig(); cleanup slot connected via timer
359:364 setParticlesCL writes ParticleCL back into Particles
parallel scene-object aggregating primitives (Particles vs Faces); identical getJson/aggregator API
9:31 deflate spawns pigz process via QProcess
29 routes HTTP requests to simulation control
30 owns OpenCL device, drives physics loop
streaming output architecture implies sink contract
12 sink injected into RequestMapper flows to Simulation; RequestSender is concrete sink
26 holds SimulationSink* and passes to Simulation
sink is the frame/log channel (RequestSender in prod)
both are singleton HTTP egress points using RestClient; Sender generic vs RequestSender sim-aware
94:137 loadStl uses tetgen to parse STL into Faces
MaterialsManager aggregates Material; parallel constructor+getCL tests
ObjectsManager aggregates NonSolidObject; parallel JSON-ctor test
both restructure the neighborhood build away from O(N^2) brute force
CSR removes embedded neighborhood arrays, biggest contributor to struct bloat (#3) and register pressure (#7)
ReducedParticle is described as a stepping stone toward full SoA
fuses reset+gravity+integrate stages of the pipeline
shrinks Particle struct from ~6KB to ~200 bytes
enables half-neighbor lists naturally during CSR construction
simple API is the stateless wrapper over Connection
tetgenmesh uses insphere for Delaunay test
exactinit must be called before predicates
exactinit must be called before predicates
